summary.lv: Ubiquiti Rīgā meklē Senior AI/Computer Vision inženieri, kas vada datorredzes un AI sistēmas no koncepcijas līdz produkcijai — modelu apmācība (PyTorch/TensorFlow), optimizācija edge ierīcēm un integrācija C++ inference cauruļvados.
summary.en: Ubiquiti in Riga is hiring a Senior AI/Computer Vision Engineer to own CV and AI systems end-to-end — training models (PyTorch/TensorFlow), optimizing for edge devices, and integrating them into C++ inference pipelines for products used at global scale.
